response:
The movies *Queen of Blood* and *Battle Beyond the Sun* both contained scenes from the 1959 Soviet feature film **"I Was a Satellite of the Sun"**. 

This film, directed by Mikhail Karyukov and Aleksandr Kozyr, is a science fiction film that inspired the U.S. version of *Battle Beyond the Sun*, which was an English-dubbed and re-edited version of the 1959 Soviet film. *Queen of Blood* also drew from the same source material, as it was based on the screenplay for the earlier Soviet film *Mechte Navstrechu*, which was also inspired by *I Was a Satellite of the Sun*.
